privileged_info_summary: The task 'align_and_distribute_images@1' operates on a synthetic presentation file (product_showcase.odp) with two slides. Slide 2 (index 1) contains three product images with text labels 'WATCH', 'CAMERA', and 'HEADPHONES' (in uppercase), generated via ImageMagick during setup. The presentation file path is /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/product_showcase.odp. Verification uses a tolerance threshold of 0.05 cm for both vertical center alignment (checking standard deviation of y-coordinates) and horizontal gap distribution (checking difference between adjacent gaps). All images are synthetically generated; no external data sources are used.
